case_title: SANTOS, PATRICIA vs. CATAPANO, LAURA AN IND/DBA STAR BAKERY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTOS, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT CATAPANO, LAURA AN IND/DBA STAR BAKERY
